blocks.text: The supervisor is the daemon-tier control loop that connects runtime actors, task claims, preparation, reporting, and shutdown cancellation.

items: It owns public daemon runtime orchestration under `internal/agentbridge/supervisor`.
It delegates canonical persistence through control-plane ports instead of owning server HTTP transport or infra state.
It remains separate from local API, project/MWSD sync, SaaS adapter, and task DB implementation slices.
